steps.title: Identify how the sentence credits cause to effect
steps.content: The key signal is the sentence structure: the team ______ the temperature difference to water evaporation. The blank must express crediting the observation to its cause.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Attributed means credited to or explained as caused by—exactly what's needed to connect the observation to its cause. The other three either express reluctant agreement, prescribe rules, or describe correction, not crediting an observation to its underlying explanation.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
